title: Warden of Routine
description: The crossing guard Masterite. A woman with a STOP sign who has guarded one intersection since the beginning.

steps.text: She was wearing an orange vest and carrying a STOP sign. She was standing in the exact center of the crosswalk, and she had clearly been standing there for some time.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: We need to cross the street.

lines.speaker: Warden of Routine
lines.text: No crossing without the signal. The signal says WALK. I say WALK. Not before. Not after. Not due to extenuating circumstances.

lines.speaker: Warden of Routine
lines.text: The absence of visible traffic does not indicate the absence of traffic.

lines.speaker: Warden of Routine
lines.text: Crossing without the signal is a violation. Violations are not quick. Violations have consequences. Consequences take time. Stand behind the line.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: How long have you been standing here?

lines.speaker: Warden of Routine
lines.text: Since before the crosswalk. Since before the intersection. Since before the street was a street. It was a path. Before that, it was a direction. I guarded the direction.

lines.speaker: Warden of Routine
lines.text: The signal will change when the signal changes. Until then: halt.
